# .NET Version Upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgrading ContosoUniversity from .NET Framework 4.8 (ASP.NET MVC 5) to .NET 10 (ASP.NET Core MVC) using All-At-Once strategy.

**Progress**: 3/3 tasks complete (100%) ![100%](https://progress-bar.xyz/100)

## Tasks

- ✅ 01-convert-project: Convert Project to SDK-Style and Update Target Framework
- ✅ 02-migrate-aspnet-core: Migrate to ASP.NET Core
- ✅ 03-fix-warnings: Fix Build Warnings
